personal.name: Charbel Hajj Moussa
personal.title: Cybersecurity Professional & Full-Stack Developer
personal.bio: I am a 22-year-old Computer Science Master's student at the Lebanese University, dedicated entirely to cybersecurity defense and ethical hacking, while maintaining a strong parallel interest in web development and software engineering. My expertise bridges the gap between monitoring enterprise traffic in a SOC environment and developing full-stack web applications, ensuring my projects are structurally sound, highly functional, and actively optimized for security.

passions.label: Fitness & Self-Care
passions.description: Discipline starts with the body. I'm committed to the gym, staying organized, and maintaining a balanced lifestyle.

passions.label: Music
passions.description: I play guitar and drums — music is my creative outlet and a way to decompress after long coding sessions.

passions.label: Travel & Exploration
passions.description: I have a deep love for traveling, discovering new cultures, and constantly seeking out new experiences.

passions.label: Reading
passions.description: From technical manuals to philosophy, reading fuels my curiosity and keeps my mind sharp.

passions.label: Photography
passions.description: Capturing moments and perspectives through a lens — I find beauty in the details others overlook.
